title: Hemionitis thwaitesii
taxonomy: Hemionitis thwaitesii is classified within the family Polypodiaceae, which is a group of flowering plants known as ferns. This species is further categorized within the genus Hemionitis, which contains several species of ferns found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Hemionitis thwaitesii is based on its morphological characteristics, including its leaf structure and reproductive features. The plant is native to Sri Lanka and is often found in shaded, humid environments. As a member of the Polypodiaceae family, Hemionitis thwaitesii shares similarities with other fern species in terms of its growth habits and reproductive strategies.
